name: Makoto Edamura
description: The self-proclaimed "greatest con artist in Japan" who makes a living swindling innocent seniors and tourists. Used to be an honest, affable guy. Collects capsule toy figures and loves coffee.

name: Misha Necron
description: Misha is a student at Delzogade, the Demon King Academy. She quickly becomes friends with Anos after they meet. Her magic power is quite high among most students at Delzogade.
mediaTitles: The Misfit of Demon King Academy: History’s Strongest Demon King Reincarnates and Goes to School with His Descendants

name: Ayame Souma
description: __Zodiac Animal:__ Snake The snake of the zodiac, and big brother to Yuki, Ayame is vivacious, garrulous, and has a knack for making Yuki and Kyo angry. He runs a business that makes women's clothing, which men apparently wear as well, and he often wears women's clothing himself. He named his shop after himself and runs it with Mine, who is later revealed to be Ayame's girlfriend and the seamstress of the store. Ayame designs the dresses, erotic as some or all of them may be. name: Koutarou Amon
description: __Height:__ 191 cm (6'3") A first class police investigator who investigates Ghouls, also known as a Dove. He comes to the 20th ward with his mentor, [Mado Kureo](https://anilist.co/character/88423), to investigate Ghoul incidents in the area. He has a strong sense of justice, fervently believing it is the right and moral thing to do to exterminate the Ghouls. name: Hana Uzaki
description: Hana Uzaki is a short, silver-haired college student with an energetic personality. Her antics often annoy her senpai, [Shinichi](https://anilist.co/character/130664/).
mediaTitles: Uzaki-chan Wants to Hang Out! Season 2

name: Jae-Ha
description: __Height:__ 188 cm __Race:__ Dragon He is the descendant of the Green Dragon and possesses the power of a dragon in his right leg. His power allows him to jump high and long distances that almost make it look like he can fly. It also makes his leg incredibly strong and lethal when used to kick. He's a big flirt, he doesn't care whether it's a man or a girl. ~!Twenty-five years ago, Jae-ha was born in the Village of Ryokuryuu and Garou, the previous Ryokuryuu, took care of him. name: Arche Eeb Rile Furt
nativeName: アルシェ・イーブ・リリッツ・フルト
description: Arche Eeb Rile Furt is a worker and magic caster of Foresight who volunteered to explore and investigate the mysterious large tomb. She was a former noble and student of the Imperial Magic Academy.

name: Nine
description: Known as Nine, is one of two members of the Sphinx terrorist group. He grew up in an experimental institution for gifted children with [Twelve](https://anilist.co/character/88096/Twelve), though the both of them managed to escape. Later on, both Nine and Twelve carry out several terroristic acts in Japan. He is reserved, calm and collected, and very, very intelligent. Nine is efficient in many fields, up to exceptional computing and hacking. He's an impeccable strategist, with a knack for chess

name: Buddha
description: __Species:__ God, Human (formerly) ~!Affiliation: Humanity!~ Buddha has an easygoing attitude and does not seem to take anything seriously. His confidence is great enough for him to challenge Zeus to his face by claiming that the only one who can push him around in "all of heaven and Earth" is himself. Buddha also appears to have a sweet tooth as he was seen eating lollipops when walking and eating chocolates while relaxing. Buddha also seems to display respect for other people by offering them

name: Satoshi
description: Satoshi (known as Ash Ketchum in most international territories) is the main character of the Pocket Monsters anime. He is also the main character of various manga based on the anime, including but not limited to Dengenki Pikachu, Satoshi to Pikachu, and Pocket Monsters Diamond & Pearl. He is a Pokémon Trainer from Masara Town whose goal is to become a Pokémon Master. His starter Pokémon was a [Pikachu](https://anilist.co/character/3891) that he received from Professor Okido after arriving late

name: Tsukihi Araragi
description: __Height:__ 156 cm Tsukihi, the main character of Tsukihi Phoenix, is one of [Koyomi](https://anilist.co/character/22036/Koyomi-Araragi)'s sisters. She's the youngest of Araragi family. Unlike her sister, [Karen](https://anilist.co/character/24194/Karen-Araragi), she is always doing indoor activities. Contrary to her personality, she constantly changes her hair style and is short-tempered to the point that Koyomi describes her as having hysteria. ~!She is actually the reincarnation of a phoenix

name: Sawa Nakamura
description: A classmate of Kasuga who is portrayed as alone, isolated, and aloof. She has no friends. Nakamura witnesses Kasuga stealing Saeki's uniform and blackmails him to become her friend and form a contract. She displays hostile and rude behavior toward Kasuga, but can often be seen enjoying herself when with him. Though she maintains a usually sane and calm demeanor, Nakamura has occasionally had emotional outbursts when expressing herself to Kasuga. It is hinted that her desire to "escape" with Kasu

name: Kotoko Iwanaga
description: Kotoko is the main female protagonist in Kyokou Suiri and the current girlfriend of [Kuro Sakuragawa](https://anilist.co/character/125947/Kurou-Sakuragawa). She has a very outgoing personality and always makes an effort to find the root of any problem, especially when she has the help of yokai. She is oblivious to danger and she tends to be very clingy when it comes to Kuro. Kotoko is a self-centered, unrepentant prankster, who enjoys poking fun at others expense, and is also a bit of a pervert.

name: Lio Fotia
description: The leader of Mad Burnish. Lio seems like someone who keeps his cool, but it's actually the opposite. Lio aims to burn everything with the power of a special flame called "Burnish Flare".

name: Ashitaka
description: A prince of the Emishi tribe, Ashitaka is cursed in combat with a demonic boar. His only hope for a cure is to return to the forested land from which the boar-god originally came and discover what rage infected it. Leaving his people behind forever, he makes that journey and discovers the gods of the forest at war with the humans in a iron-mining town. Ashitaka vows to help the two sides reach a compromise, to cure them of the very anger that now eats away at him. The key to compromise appears t

name: Naota Nandaba
description: Twelve-year-old Naota Nandaba is the main character. His name is derived from the Japanese word for "honesty" and his father named him Naota because of that (Fooly Cooly). Unbeknownst to him, he has the "right kind of head" to be used as an N.O. channel. He is obsessed with appearing mature and attempts to act nonchalant. This is most expressed in his monologues which open and close each episode where he continues to claims that "nothing amazing ever happens here" despite the show's surreal and

name: Shuu Tsukiyama
description: __Height:__ 180 cm Shuu Tsukiyama was the infamous Gourmet ghoul of the 20th ward. He was a fourth-year student studying Social Welfare at the Department of Human Sciences at Seinan Gakuin University. He comes from the extremely wealthy and influential Tsukiyama family which his father, Mirumo Tsukiyama was the head of. name: Arata Kaizaki
description: A 27-year old man who seems to fail at every job interview he partakes in. He accepts an offer to be part of the ReLIFE experiment in order to receive a recommendation to a company. ~!In Chapter 221, he learns that Chizuru was a subject of ReLIFE and was shocked to discover she is older than him. After she briefly becomes sad at his possible disappointment, he assures her that he is happy with the revelation and hugs her which surprises but delights her. name: Ritsu Kageyama
description: __Height:__ 159.4 cm Ritsu is very clever and apparently serious, he also serves on the student council and excels in academics and everything else he tries. None of that matters to him as much as psychic power, however, his brother is more important to him than anyone or anything else. ~!Before he awoke his own psychic powers, he longed for the esper abilities his brother has always had and was frustrated by his own inability to do things like bend spoons. He may have a habit of carrying spoons

name: Hanabi Yasuraoka
description: At the beginning of the story she's in love with Narumi Kanai, her childhood friend who is now her teacher. She immediately realizes that Narumi is in love with Akane Minagawa and not her. She meets Mugi Awaya, who is in love with Akane, and starts a relationship with him to satisfy each other's loneliness. She has different attitudes with each character: she's cheerful with Sanae Ebato, her best friend, timid with Narumi Kanai and sincere with Mugi because she trusts him a lot.

name: Ishtar
description: __Height:__ 159 cm Ishtar is the goddess of beauty, good harvests, war, lust, discord, and fertility in Mesopotamian/Sumerian/Babylonian Mythology, and one among the many mother goddesses whose power is derived from the Earth Mother. Said to be the most pampered goddess of them all, her whimsical and egotistical personality tends to make her a nuisance for everybody around her.
